scientific_question: Does exact nearest-prototype margin predict whether a prefix cell retains its Linf Voronoi region from W44 to W45?

predictor_contract.margin: second-smallest minus smallest exact prototype Linf distance
predictor_contract.positive_label: same nearest-prototype index at W44 and W45
predictor_contract.score_direction: larger predicts stable for every named predictor
predictor_contract.deterministic_cell_hash_null: first 64 bits of SHA-256 over ASCII A331:<decimal cell>
predictor_contract.selection_rule: maximum exact global tie-aware AUC among the first seven non-null predictors then frozen predictor index

predeclared_outputs: exact twice-concordant AUC numerator and denominator for every predictor
per-W44-prototype tie-aware AUC and pair-weighted stratified AUC
five equal-count score bins with stable fraction for the selected structural predictor
selected predictor and explicit 0.55 followup boundary
A313 predictor values and empirical percentile as annotation only
deterministic cell-hash null and reversed-score identity check
